input.topic: Preview deploy is live. Invite criticism early — better now than launch day. Build log linked.
input.scenario: Build agent has pushed the preview deploy and written preview_url to the customers table. Customer should look, react, and flag issues while there's still time.
input.voice: Operator. Invites criticism without sounding insecure. Plain. Signed '— Jack / Day14'.

current_subject: Preview is up — take a look

variants.subject: Preview is up — take a look
variants.rationale: Keep the current line. Tested-feeling, short, mobile-safe, no jargon. Strong default.

variants.subject: Your preview is live — rough edges welcome
variants.rationale: Sets the expectation that this is a draft, not a launch. 'Rough edges welcome' explicitly invites the criticism the body is asking for.

variants.subject: Preview link inside — pages so far + build log
variants.rationale: Three concrete payloads in the subject (preview, pages, build log) — high signal for a customer who's been watching for this exact email.
